description: Assigns anonymous arrival losses to the current action and current proxy context.
Uses exponentially discounted anonymous arrival history within the common observable proxy context.
Uses exact retained source labels and soft proxy-based attribution for anonymous arrivals.
Reference route with every arriving outcome linked to its source action and source proxy context.
Diagnostic policy that maps the emitted noisy proxy directly to the nearest action center.
Diagnostic upper benchmark using the latent decision-time state; never a deployable method.
